content: HikariCP on Cloud Run serverless: Cloud Run scales instances independently, each with its own pool. With default max-pool-size=10 and Cloud Run max-concurrency=80 (default), you can have 80 * 10 = 800 connections hitting PostgreSQL's max_connections=100. Fix: reduce max-pool-size to 2-5 for personal projects, or use Cloud SQL Proxy + pg_bouncer. Also: keepalive-time must be shorter than Cloud SQL TCP timeout (300s) — set to 60000ms. idle-timeout should be under 300s.
